preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.interface_lang_desc: Language for UI text and default narrative.
preferences.serif_font_desc: Serif font for GM narrative text; UI uses sans-serif.
preferences.autosave_desc: Write a save and backup after each turn.

extractor.title: Narrative Extractor (GM Step 2)
extractor.enable_desc: Split GM into two steps: main model for narrative, cheaper model for structured ops. ~5x lower error rate, ~20% higher cost.
extractor.api_desc: Anthropic uses native tool_use (most stable); Vertex uses response_mime_type=application/json; others use OpenAI-compatible response_format.
extractor.model_desc: Recommended: budget tiers of current flagship models — gemini-3.5-flash / claude-haiku-4 / gpt-5.5-nano / qwen-3.7-flash etc.

clarify.title: Curator Clarify Threshold
clarify.threshold_desc: When confidence is below this value, curator skips GM and asks the player directly. 0 = never ask, 1 = always ask first.

models.title: API Keys
models.description: Only shows providers with a configured API Key. Keys are encrypted in the user credentials table and never stored in plaintext.
models.empty_desc: Add an API Key for a provider to see its models here.
models.delete_key_confirm: Delete the API Key for "{{name}}"? Its models will no longer be available.

add_model.title: Configure a new model
add_model.real_name_hint: Sent to {{api}} as the model name
add_model.caps_hint: Affects where this model can be used

edit_api.provider_desc: Select a supported provider to auto-fill the Base URL; choose Custom to enter manually.
edit_api.custom_provider_desc: Enter ID and Base URL manually
edit_api.api_key_desc_new: Encrypted at rest; never shown again after saving
edit_api.api_key_placeholder_keep: Leave blank to keep current key
edit_api.key_save_fail: Metadata saved but API key write failed

visibility.title: {{selected}} / {{total}} models shown in list
visibility.no_match: No match · Try a different search
visibility.info: Hiding does not delete models — they just won't appear in the main list. POST /api/v1/models/visibility

validate.fail_hint: Check API key configuration or Base URL reachability.
validate.local_extra: {{count}} local model(s) missing from remote probe or unreachable
validate.in_sync: Local list matches remote — no changes needed.

model_list.no_match: No match · None of {{count}} models meet the criteria
model_list.hidden_note: {{count}} models hidden · Click Edit Visibility to manage
model_list.key_expired_detail: Please update this provider's API key
model_list.health_degraded: Degraded · High latency or rate limited
model_list.health_untested: Untested · Click API Test to check

modelparams.title: Model Settings
modelparams.description: Sampling parameters · Applies to all API calls
modelparams.preset_desc: Quick-switch a set of common parameters; selecting Custom prevents overwrite.
modelparams.reasoning_desc: Thinking depth for reasoning models (o3 / R1 etc.); low = fast & token-efficient, high = deepest.
modelparams.max_tokens_desc: Maximum response length per turn; too short will cause truncation.
modelparams.context_size_desc: Upper limit of tokens per request; older history is truncated when exceeded.
modelparams.seed_desc: Same seed + same input = reproducible output; -1 = random each time.
modelparams.stop_desc: Stop generating when these strings appear; separate multiple with |.
modelparams.nsfw_desc: Controls whether GM generates sensitive content involving sex / violence. Sexualization of minors is always blocked regardless of mode.
modelparams.nsfw_intensity_desc: 0 = only on explicit player request; 1 = GM may actively escalate. Effective only in Open / Explicit mode.
modelparams.nsfw_extra_desc: Appended to system prompt; use for additional prohibitions, age verification, story prerequisites.
modelparams.mirostat_desc: Dynamic temperature adjustment; effective on some local models.
modelparams.preview_json_desc: Actual sampling parameters sent to the API.

modules.title: Per-Module Model Assignment
modules.description: Assign a separate model per LLM sub-module · Leave blank to follow main GM
modules.hint: Main GM is changed in API Settings; other modules fall back to main GM when not overridden. Model list comes from model_catalog.json; grayed-out means provider disabled.
modules.inherit_tip: Not overridden — using main GM's current model
modules.footer: Changes are saved immediately via POST /api/me/preference. Each module picks up the new setting on next invocation.

memory.recall_depth_desc: Max passages retrieved from source per turn (2–20).
memory.summary_window_desc: Compress the last N turns into a summary for injection (3–20).
memory.token_budget_desc: Max tokens of memory content injected into context per request (200–2000).
memory.auto_archive: Auto-archive Old Memories After N Turns
memory.auto_archive_desc: Memory entries older than this many turns are auto-archived to the fact store (10–200).
memory.pinned_max_desc: Max entries in the pinned bucket (5–100). Older entries are moved to fact store when exceeded.
memory.bucket_pinned_desc: When disabled, pinned bucket is not maintained; recall only uses time-based and character buckets.
memory.bucket_world_desc: When disabled, world-lore memory retrieval injection is skipped.
memory.bucket_character_desc: When disabled, character-relationship memory retrieval injection is skipped.

permissions.title: Write Permissions
permissions.default_mode_desc: Default permissions used when creating a new save. Can be changed in-game at any time.
permissions.mode_review: Auto Review — low-risk pass, high-risk prompt
permissions.mode_full: Full Access — prompt only for major world-line changes
permissions.high_risk_desc: Even in Full Access mode, these fields trigger a non-blocking confirmation. Click to toggle.
permissions.custom_whitelist_desc: Add custom paths (e.g. world.weather.severity); these always prompt even in Full Access mode.
permissions.err_invalid: Only letters, digits, underscores, dots, and asterisks are allowed; must start with a letter or underscore
permissions.err_in_builtin: This path is already in the built-in whitelist
permissions.audit_log_desc: Last 200 state write / rejection / parse-failure records (per save). Empty when no active save.
permissions.audit_no_state: No active save. Audit entries generated during gameplay will appear here.

deploy.title: Deployment
deploy.warning: Note: Network-level settings such as listen address and CORS origins require a service restart to take effect. SMTP and CAPTCHA credentials take effect immediately.
deploy.listen_addr_desc: Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only access. Requires restart.
deploy.cors_desc: Comma-separated; use * to allow all. Requires restart.
deploy.upload_limit_desc: Maximum single file size, e.g. 12MB or 1GB. Requires restart.
deploy.upload_limit_error: Invalid format. Enter something like 12MB, 512KB, or 1GB
deploy.smtp_desc: Used for registration verification, password reset, and subscription notifications. Disabled means local placeholder mail.
deploy.smtp_preset_desc: Quick-fill common provider settings; you can fine-tune after selecting.
deploy.smtp_from_desc: Sender shown to recipients; recommended to use a domain email.
deploy.smtp_test_desc: Send a test email to the current account's email address immediately.
deploy.captcha_desc: Used for registration / password reset / login retry. Recommended in production.
deploy.captcha_recaptcha_ver_desc: v2 = popup challenge · v3 = invisible scoring; v3 recommended.
deploy.captcha_score_desc: Scores below this are treated as bots; 0.5 is a good starting point.
deploy.captcha_widget_desc: Non-interactive suits most cases; interactive adds a challenge for suspicious users.
deploy.captcha_triggers_desc: Check the features that require verification; forced after 3 failed logins by default.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.clear_saves_desc: Keeps scripts and library, but deletes all progress and branches.
danger.reset_platform_desc: Full reset is not supported from the UI; run it via server CLI.
danger.clear_modal_desc: This will delete all {{count}} save(s) and their branch trees. Scripts and library are preserved. This cannot be undone.

providers.title: Provider Credentials (BYOK)
providers.description: API keys are encrypted in the user credentials table; not stored in plaintext in the catalog. base_url supports relay/proxy override.
providers.keep_key: Leave blank to keep current key

auth.subtitle: Novel splitting · RPG continuation · Multi-user creative platform
auth.forgot_notice: Please contact an admin to reset your password (self-service not yet available)
auth.invite_only_tip: This deployment is invite-only; registration is closed
auth.invite_only_note: This deployment is invite-only. Contact an admin to get an account.
auth.first_admin: The first registered user will become the admin.
auth.min_password: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
auth.terms_not_accepted: Please read and accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.age_not_confirmed: Please confirm you are 18 years of age or older
auth.terms_agree: I have read and agree to the

verify.resend_ok: Code resent, please check your email
verify.sent_notice: Verification code sent to {{mask}}. Please verify within 10 minutes.
